timing.bpm_tip: Beats per minute. Defines the rhythmic grid speed.
timing.offset_tip: The start time of the first beat in milliseconds. Synchronizes grid with audio.

difficulty.ar_tip: The speed at which hit objects appear. High AR gives less time to react.
difficulty.cs_tip: The size of hit objects. Higher values mean smaller circles.
difficulty.od_tip: Determines how precise you must be to get a 300. Higher values are stricter.
difficulty.hp_tip: How fast health depletes and how hard it is to recover.

ai.grid_snap_tooltip: Aligns notes to the rhythmic grid. 1/4 is standard for most maps.
ai.style_tooltip: Defines the visual flow: Jumps (distance), Streams (speed), or Balanced.

range.title: Generation Range
range.tooltip: Enable to limit generation to a specific time interval.

info.title: Song Title
info.artist_tip: The name of the music creator.
